name: Zippy Squash Casserole
recipeIngredient: 3 slices Bacon, cooked, drained and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the squash thoroughly and trim off the ends.
2. Place the squash in boiling salted water to cover and cook for 15 to 20 minutes or until tender. Drain and mash.
3. In a bowl, combine the remaining ingredients: chopped onion, celery, crumbled bacon, pimentos, green chile peppers, salt, garlic powder, pepper, breadcrumbs, and melted butter.
4. Add the mashed squash to the mixture and stir well.
5. Pour the squash mixture into a buttered 1-1/2 quart casserole dish.
6. Sprinkle the breadcrumb mixture over the top of the squash.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
Yield: 4 servings
